A '''diplomatic mission''' to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]] was undertaken by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. However, the mission was never carried out as a [[Bimm (furred species)/Legends|Bimm]] traitor used the Solos' presence on [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]] to attempt to hand them over to [[Thrawn's confederation]]. After informing the confederation—led by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], a team of at least eight [[Noghri Death Commando]]s member of [[Team Eight]] attacked the visitors at the planet's [[Bimmisaari marketplace|marketplace]]. However, some of the Noghris present there were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the Solos. At the same time, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who had also traveled to the planet, killed several Noghri who held him [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] and rushed to the Solos' rescue. When Skywalker arrived at their location, Solo's [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] [[Laser cannon/Legends|shot]] at the Noghris, eliminating the ones that were still alive after Solo killed most, ending the attack on the visitors, and bringing the attempt to capture the Solos to an end.

==Prelude==
In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]],<ref name="TERC" /> [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] began his [[Thrawn campaign|campaigns]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The Chiss recruited [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Joruus C'baoth]], who asked him in turn of his [[The Force/Legends|services]] during his campaigns—controlling Thrawn's fleet—to acquire the two [[Solo twins (disambiguation)|twins]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] was carrying. Therefore, Thrawn, upon getting news of the Princess' visit to [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]], sent a [[Team Eight|team]] of [[Noghri Death Commando]]s to the planet in an attempt to capture C'baoth's "demands."<ref name="Heir" />
